overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a robed character walking along a misty castle walkway at night. The scene features Gothic architecture, burning braziers, and a foggy coastal atmosphere with warm orange moonlight contrasting against deep blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior walkway with lit brazier

agents.ego_description: character in dark wizard robes walking steadily along the stone pathway beside the Gothic castle wall, approaching a burning stone brazier

entered.detail: ornate stone facade with tall arched windows featuring intricate tracery and warm interior lighting
tall stone pedestal with burning flames providing warm orange illumination
wide stone tile pathway running along the cliff edge
mist-covered ocean extending to the horizon under the night sky
rocky formations visible through the fog across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a castle walkway, with a robed character walking forward past Gothic architecture. A lit stone brazier burns brightly on the right as the character approaches, casting warm light against the cool blue fog. The stone pathway stretches ahead along the cliffside overlooking the misty sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior walkway continuing along foggy coastline

events.description: character moves out of camera view, leaving an empty walkway perspective

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal walkway with the character no longer visible in frame, maintaining steady forward movement

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward along the empty castle walkway after the character exits the frame. The stone brazier falls behind and disappears from view, while the Gothic wall continues along the left and the foggy sea remains visible to the right. The path stretches into the misty distance under the glowing moon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a misty castle walkway that transitions from a guided walk with a character to a solitary drift into the foggy distance. It begins with a robed figure walking past Gothic architecture, passing a brightly lit stone brazier that casts a warm orange glow against the cool blue fog. As the character exits the frame, the camera continues its steady advance, leaving the warmth of the brazier behind. The scene then opens up to the empty stone pathway, flanked by a towering Gothic wall on the left and the vast, misty sea on the right. Finally, the perspective stretches further into the haze, moving toward the glowing moon as the path disappears into the nocturnal fog.
